sentence: 他花了两个小时才把家具组装好。
pinyin: Tā huā le liǎng gè xiǎo shí cái bǎ jiā jù zǔ zhuāng hǎo.
english: It took him two hours to assemble the furniture.

meaning: 1. to press close to; 2. to snuggle close; 3. intimate
sentence: 她贴近窗口，想听清楚外面的声音。
pinyin: Tā tiē jìn chuāngkǒu, xiǎng tīng qīngchǔ wàimiàn de shēngyīn.
english: She pressed close to the window, trying to hear the sounds outside more clearly.

meaning: 1. front-line; 2. forward position; 3. outpost; 4. extending ahead; 5.
sentence: 她一直在研究人工智能的前沿技术。
pinyin: Tā yīzhí zài yánjiū réngōng zhìnéng de qiányán jìshù.
english: She has been researching cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology.

sentence: 这个方案合乎公司的规定。
pinyin: Zhège fāng'àn héhū gōngsī de guīdìng.
english: This plan conforms to the company's regulations.

pinyin: Tā duì xīn guīdìng yǒuxiē dǐchù.
english: He has some resistance to the new rules.
